## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction steps

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser (exact version):
- TalkCut version or commit:
- Video codec/container (if relevant):

## Logs / screenshots

If applicable, add browser console output or screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I can reproduce this with the latest commit on `main`.
- [ ] I have tested in an up-to-date Chromium-based browser for export-related issues.
